description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.7 Docker image and defines a single stage called pages. Add a pages job that runs in the pages stage, first executing a before_script to install dependencies with `pip install -r requirements.txt Jinja2 markdown`. In the script it runs `python get-commands.py toaster | python build-command-reference.py command-ref`, then moves the generated `command-ref` into `public/docs/` with `mv command-ref public/docs/` and copies the favicon assets using `cp -r command-ref-templates/favicons public/favicons/`. Publish the `public` directory as a pages artifact and configure the job to run only on the `master` and `beta` branches.
